text.title: Internal Link Rotation Schedule Decision Tree
text.summary: Routing tree mapping graph-spec freshness, cluster count, calendar availability, and backlog state to a rule from 01-core-rules.xml.

decision-tree.root-question: Is a fresh graph spec available AND cluster count in [3,10] AND a 60-min bi-weekly slot reserved?

branch.when: graph_spec_missing == true OR graph_spec_crawl_date OLDER THAN 30 days

conclusion.verdict: SKIP — fortnightly rotation outside coverage band
BLOCK — defer overflow; do not extend the slot

branch.when: any deferred_fix row overdue AND status='open'

conclusion.verdict: BLOCK — escalate overdue fix into next rotation slot

branch.when: any rotation_calendar slot has status='paused' WITHOUT reason

conclusion.verdict: BLOCK — log reason for the pause
BLOCK — write retrospective before next quarter

text.example: Graph spec fresh + 6 clusters + bi-weekly slot + audit_log within 60 min + no overdue fixes + retrospective written → APPROVE.
